messages.app.name: Nami Mail
messages.app.credentialsLocal: Account credentials stay on this device
messages.language.title: Language
messages.language.description: Choose the interface language for Nami Mail
messages.language.label: Interface language
messages.oauth.callback.success.title: Nami Mail authorization complete
messages.oauth.callback.success.message: Authorization is complete. You can close this window and return to Nami Mail.
messages.oauth.callback.failure.title: Nami Mail authorization not completed
messages.oauth.callback.failure.message: Authorization was not completed. Return to Nami Mail to review the issue and try again.
messages.account.title: Add an email account
messages.account.description: Enter an email address and Nami Mail will look for a secure sign-in method and server settings.
messages.account.privacy_note: Passwords and authorization credentials are encrypted and kept only on this device. They are never uploaded to Nami Mail.
messages.account.provider.title: Choose a provider
messages.account.provider.catalog_label: Choose from the full provider list
messages.account.provider.picker_note: Email providers not listed here can still use auto-discovery or manual IMAP / SMTP setup.
messages.account.provider.default_credential_hint: Use a password, app password, or authorization code that your email provider allows for third-party mail clients.
messages.account.provider.default_setup_step_imap: Enable IMAP and SMTP in your email settings.
messages.account.provider.default_setup_step_cred: If two-step verification is enabled, create an app password or client authorization code.
messages.account.provider.default_setup_step_no_o: Do not enter a one-time code from SMS, email, or an authenticator app.
messages.account.email.label: Email address
messages.account.email.help: Enter a complete email address to begin detection. Custom domains are checked after you finish entering the address.
messages.account.discovery.idle: Available settings will be detected after you enter an email address.
messages.account.discovery.busy: Looking for a secure sign-in method and server settings…
messages.account.error.email_required: Enter an email address to continue.
messages.account.error.email_required_for_login: Enter a valid email address to continue with sign-in.
messages.account.error.oauth_unavailable: This email account does not currently have a secure sign-in option. Use an app password or manual setup instead.
messages.account.error.manual_invalid: Enter valid IMAP and SMTP hosts, ports, and TLS modes.
messages.account.status.discovery_manual_review: Possible connection settings were found. Check the server details and use manual setup if needed.
messages.account.status.discovery_unavailable: The provider could not be detected automatically. You can still continue with manual IMAP/SMTP settings.
messages.account.status.refresh_unavailable: The account was added, but the mail list could not refresh. Close and reopen Nami Mail to view it.
messages.account.status.oauth_canceled: Stopped waiting for authorization. You can close the page in your browser.
messages.account.status.oauth_completed: Authorization is complete and the account was added.
messages.account.status.oauth_demo_completed: Authorization is complete in demo mode.
messages.account.status.demo_connected: The account is connected and recent mail has been synced.
messages.account.status.sync_warning: The account was added, but {warning}. You can sync it again later in account settings.
messages.account.status.sync_warning_generic: The account was added, but the first sync did not finish. You can sync it again later in account settings.
messages.account.status.sync_warning_issue: The account was added, but the first sync did not finish. {title}: {guidance}
messages.account.status.copy_server_settings_fail: Server settings could not be copied. Select the IMAP / SMTP details above and copy them manually.
messages.account.credential.no_one_time_code: Do not enter a one-time code
messages.account.credential.help: Use the password, authorization code, or app password provided for mail clients by your provider.
messages.account.guide.title: Setup guide
messages.account.guide.preview: These are preview settings. Once you enter a complete email address, Nami Mail will try to discover usable endpoints.
messages.account.guide.custom_preview: After you enter a complete work or school email address, Nami Mail will try to find usable connection settings. You can switch to manual setup at any time.
messages.account.guide.custom_discovered: These settings were found automatically. Check them against the details provided by your email administrator.
messages.account.server.copy_note: Copied settings never include passwords or authorization credentials.
messages.account.oauth.title: Sign in with {provider}
messages.account.oauth.description: Authorization happens in your browser. Nami Mail does not see or save your web sign-in password.
messages.account.oauth.config_unavailable: {provider} sign-in is not configured on this device. Use an app password or manual setup instead.
messages.account.oauth.waiting_description: Complete sign-in and allow access in your browser. This window will continue automatically when it is finished.
messages.account.manual.description: Use this only when auto-discovery is not suitable. Follow the details provided by your email provider or administrator.
messages.account.manual.username_placeholder: Uses your email address by default
messages.compose.subject: Subject
messages.compose.attachment.uploadingHint: You can save the draft or send the message when uploads finish.
messages.compose.attachment.failedHint: Some attachments could not be uploaded. Retry or remove them before continuing.
messages.compose.error.senderLocked: This draft is tied to its original sending account.
messages.compose.error.maxAttachments: You can add up to 10 attachments at a time.
messages.compose.error.maxAttachmentSize: Attachments cannot exceed 25 MB in total.
messages.compose.error.maxSingleAttachmentSize: An individual attachment cannot exceed 25 MB.
messages.compose.error.emptyAttachment: An empty file cannot be attached.
messages.compose.error.pendingAttachments: Finish or resolve pending attachment uploads first.
messages.compose.error.messageRequired: Add a message body or an attachment.
messages.compose.error.sendRejected: The server did not accept this message for sending.
messages.compose.error.draftUnconfirmed: The draft save has not been confirmed yet. Try again shortly.
messages.compose.delivery.waitingNotice: The message was submitted and is being checked against Sent.
messages.compose.delivery.unknown: The message was submitted, but its final delivery status is not yet confirmed. Check Sending status.
messages.compose.delivery.confirmed: The message was sent and confirmed in Sent.
messages.compose.delivery.submitted: The message was submitted and is waiting for Sent confirmation.
messages.compose.delivery.previousDraftRemains: {message} The original draft remains and can be handled later.
messages.compose.save.attachmentWarning: Some attachments need to be uploaded again
messages.mail.unread.retained: {count} just-read messages will leave this view when you switch away
messages.mail.empty.firstAccountDescription: Once connected, your mail is securely synced to this device.
messages.mail.empty.inboxDescription: New mail will appear here when it arrives.
messages.mail.empty.starredDescription: Star important messages to find them quickly later.
messages.mail.empty.searchDescription: Try a different keyword or clear the search.
messages.mail.empty.folderDescription: There is no mail to show in this folder yet.
messages.mail.action.moveRefreshing: Message moved. Verifying its new location with your mail server.
messages.mail.action.locationUnverified: This is a local read-only copy and cannot be changed or downloaded
messages.mail.action.movedLocationUnverified: Message archived. The local read-only copy is open.
messages.mail.action.moveChecking: Checking with your mail server whether the message was moved.
messages.mail.reader.emptyDescription: Open a message from the list to read it here.
messages.mail.moveLocationUnverified.title: Message archived; the local copy is read-only
messages.mail.moveLocationUnverified.description: This mail service did not provide a verifiable remote location. You can still read, copy, or reply. To prevent an unsafe action, changing status, moving again, and downloading attachments are unavailable.
messages.translation.title: Translate to {language}
messages.translation.disclaimer: The message body is sent only when you choose Translate. Machine translation may be inaccurate.
messages.translation.availability.checking: Checking translation configuration on this device.
messages.translation.availability.unavailable: Translation is not configured on this device. Add a compatible service in Settings > Translation service.
messages.translation.availability.invalid: The saved translation configuration cannot be read or is invalid. Save it again in Settings > Translation service.
messages.translation.availability.unknown: Translation configuration could not be read. Check the local service, then try again.
messages.translation.error.notConfigured: Translation is not configured on this device. Configure a compatible service and try again.
messages.translation.error.invalidTarget: The current display language is not available for translation.
messages.translation.error.contentUnavailable: This message does not have a plain-text body that can be translated.
messages.translation.error.requestTooLarge: The message body is larger than this translation service allows.
messages.translation.error.timeout: The translation service timed out. Check the network or service, then try again.
messages.translation.error.tlsCertificate: The translation service TLS certificate could not be verified. Check the system time, proxy, and service certificate; do not disable certificate verification.
messages.translation.error.tlsHandshake: A secure TLS connection to the translation service could not be established. Check the service address, port, and TLS configuration.
messages.translation.error.serverNotFound: The translation service address could not be resolved. Check the address, DNS, and network settings.
messages.translation.error.networkUnavailable: The current network cannot reach the translation service. Check the network, VPN/proxy, and firewall settings.
messages.translation.error.connectionRefused: The translation service refused the connection. Check the address, port, and whether the service is running.
messages.translation.error.connectionFailed: The connection to the translation service ended before it completed. Check the network, VPN/proxy, and firewall settings, then try again.
messages.translation.error.serviceAuthentication: The translation service rejected authentication. Check the service API key, access permission, or proxy authentication.
messages.translation.error.rateLimited: The translation service is temporarily limiting requests. Try again later or check the service quota.
messages.translation.error.serviceUnavailable: The translation service is temporarily unavailable, possibly because it is under maintenance or experiencing an outage. Try again later.
messages.translation.error.serviceRejected: The translation service rejected this request. Check its configuration or usage limits.
messages.translation.error.invalidResponse: The translation service returned invalid content. Try again later.
messages.translation.error.responseTooLarge: The translation service returned too much content to display safely.
messages.translation.error.localServiceUnavailabl: Nami Mail's local service could not be reached. Confirm that the app is still running, then check again.
messages.translation.error.failed: Translation could not be completed. Try again later.
messages.settings.translation.title: Translation service
messages.settings.translation.description: This service is used only when you choose to translate a message. API keys are encrypted on this device.
messages.settings.translation.demoDescription: Demo mode shows local translation previews only. It does not contact a translation service or send mail content.
messages.settings.translation.endpointHint: Use a LibreTranslate-compatible HTTPS /translate address, or a local loopback address.
messages.settings.translation.apiKeyHint: Leave this blank to keep the current key. It is never shown again after saving.
messages.settings.translation.apiKeyOptionalHint: Optional; enter one only when your translation service requires it.
messages.settings.translation.apiKeyEnvironmentHi: This service uses a startup environment key. Enter a replacement key before saving local settings.
messages.settings.translation.apiKeyRecoveryHint: The saved setting cannot be read. Enter a new API key if this service requires one.
messages.settings.translation.apiKeyPlaceholder: Optional; enter only when your service requires it
messages.settings.translation.showApiKey: Show the API key entered this time
messages.settings.translation.hideApiKey: Hide the API key entered this time
messages.settings.translation.timeoutHint: 1000 to 60000. Increase it when the network is slow.
messages.settings.translation.saved: Translation service saved. It is ready for messages you choose to translate.
messages.settings.translation.keyRemoved: The saved translation service API key was removed.
messages.settings.translation.removed: The translation service and API key saved on this device were removed.
messages.settings.translation.endpointRequired: Enter a compatible translation service address before saving.
messages.settings.translation.source.local: This setting is encrypted and stored on this device.
messages.settings.translation.source.environment: The app currently uses startup environment configuration. Saving uses this device's local setting instead.
messages.settings.translation.source.none: Translation service is not configured yet.
messages.settings.translation.configurationInvali: The translation service setting is invalid. Use an HTTPS /translate address (or local loopback) and a timeout between 1000 and 60000 ms.
messages.settings.translation.configurationUnread: The translation service setting saved on this device cannot be read. Re-enter the service address and API key, then save.
messages.settings.translation.configurationManage: This runtime manages the translation service, so it cannot be changed here.
messages.settings.translation.loadFailed: Could not read translation service settings. Check the local service, then try again.
messages.settings.translation.saveFailed: Could not save translation service settings.
messages.mail.attachment.demoUnavailable: Attachment downloads are unavailable in demo mode.
messages.mail.sync.partialFolders: Synced {synced} messages; {folders} folders did not finish.
messages.mail.verification.subject: subject
messages.mail.verification.label: Verification code detected in the {source}
messages.mail.verification.copyFailed: Could not copy the verification code. Select and copy it manually.
messages.sending.title: Sending status
messages.sending.sidebarAttentionAndActive: {attention} messages need confirmation; {active} are being checked
messages.sending.loadError: Could not load sending records for {count} accounts: {message}
messages.sending.pending.label: Waiting to submit
messages.sending.pending.detail: This message is still waiting locally to be submitted.
messages.sending.submitting.label: Submitting
messages.sending.submitting.detail: The message is being handed to the outgoing server.
messages.sending.submitted.label: Submitted, awaiting confirmation
messages.sending.submitted.detail: The message was submitted and is being checked against Sent.
messages.sending.confirmed.label: Sent confirmed
messages.sending.confirmed.detail: This message was confirmed in Sent.
messages.sending.unknownDelivery.label: Delivery needs confirmation
messages.sending.unknownDelivery.detail: The server accepted the request, but final delivery cannot yet be confirmed.
messages.sending.failed.label: Sending not completed
messages.sending.failed.detail: The message did not finish sending. Review the reason before deciding whether to retry.
messages.sending.modal.title: Sending status
messages.sending.modal.emptyDescription: After you send a message, Nami Mail verifies its Sent status here.
messages.sending.modal.verifyTooltip: This ID verifies the same message in Sent without exposing its contents.
messages.sending.modal.subject: Subject
messages.sending.retry.title: Create a new message?
messages.sending.retry.description: The final delivery status of this message is not confirmed yet. Creating a new draft will not resend the original message; check Sent before you send it.
messages.settings.title: Settings
messages.settings.appearance.title: Appearance
messages.settings.appearance.description: Adjust the theme and background for a more comfortable reading experience.
messages.settings.theme.system.label: System
messages.settings.theme.system.detail: Follow the system light or dark appearance
messages.settings.theme.light.label: Light
messages.settings.theme.dark.label: Dark
messages.settings.background.title: Background
messages.settings.background.offlineHint: Background images stay on this device.
messages.settings.background.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, and WebP are supported up to 50 MB.
messages.settings.background.unsupportedFile: “{filename}” is not a supported image format.
messages.settings.background.fileTooLarge: “{filename}” is larger than 50 MB and cannot be used.
messages.settings.background.custom.label: Custom background
messages.settings.background.custom.localImage: Choose an image stored on this device
messages.settings.background.custom.savedOnDevice: This image is stored only on this device
messages.settings.background.custom.demoOnly: Applies only to this demo session
messages.settings.background.customSaved: Custom background saved to this device.
messages.settings.background.customDemo: Custom background applied in demo mode.
messages.settings.background.demoCleared: Custom background cleared in demo mode.
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.none.label: None
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.paper.label: Paper
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.mist.label: Mist
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.coast.label: Coast
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.dawn.label: Dawn
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.night.label: Night
messages.settings.backgroundPreset.night.descript: A low-contrast background for dark theme
messages.settings.notifications.title: Notifications
messages.settings.notifications.description: Choose how you want to be alerted about new mail.
messages.settings.notifications.desktop.label: Desktop notifications
messages.settings.notifications.desktop.descripti: Show new mail alerts in the system notification center
messages.settings.notifications.focused.label: Notify while Nami Mail is focused
messages.settings.notifications.focused.descripti: Show new mail alerts even while you are using Nami Mail
messages.settings.notifications.testBody: This is a test notification from Nami Mail.
messages.settings.sound.title: Notification sound
messages.settings.sound.description: Choose a sound for new mail.
messages.settings.sound.system.label: System sound
messages.settings.sound.system.detail: Use the operating system's default notification sound
messages.settings.sound.soft.label: Soft
messages.settings.sound.bright.label: Bright
messages.settings.sound.none.label: Silent
messages.settings.sound.none.detail: Do not play a sound for new mail
messages.settings.sound.silentTest: Notifications are set to silent, so no sound will play.
messages.settings.desktop.title: Desktop behavior
messages.settings.desktop.description: Choose what Nami Mail does when you close its window.
messages.settings.closeBehavior.ask.label: Ask every time
messages.settings.closeBehavior.ask.detail: Choose whether to minimize to tray or quit when closing
messages.settings.closeBehavior.tray.label: Minimize to tray
messages.settings.closeBehavior.tray.detail: Keep Nami Mail running in the background after closing the window
messages.settings.closeBehavior.quit.label: Quit app
messages.settings.closeBehavior.quit.detail: Quit Nami Mail when its window closes
messages.settings.update.status.unavailable: Automatic updates are available only in the desktop app.
messages.settings.update.status.idle: Updates have not been checked yet.
messages.settings.update.status.ready: v{version} is ready to install after restart.
messages.settings.update.status.error: Could not complete the update check for v{version}.
messages.settings.sync.title: Sync
messages.settings.sync.description: Set how often mail refreshes in the background.
messages.settings.sync.refresh.label: Automatic refresh
messages.settings.sync.refresh.description: Nami Mail checks for new mail periodically while it is open.
messages.settings.account.title: Accounts
messages.settings.account.description: Manage connected email accounts and their sync status.
messages.settings.account.demoDescription: Demo accounts exist only for this session.
messages.settings.account.empty: No email accounts are connected yet.
messages.settings.account.syncPartial: {email} synced, but {failedFolders} folders did not finish.
messages.settings.defaults.appliedToDemo: Default settings applied to demo mode.
messages.settings.demo.resetAfterSession: {message} It will reset when the demo session ends.
messages.settings.confirmation.removeAccountDescr: This removes the account, cached mail, and encrypted credentials from this device. Mail on the server is not deleted.
messages.settings.confirmation.clearBackgroundDes: The background image saved on this device will be deleted.
messages.settings.confirmation.restoreDefaultsDes: Theme, background, notification, and sync preferences will be reset to their defaults.
messages.settings.confirmation.installUpdateDescr: Nami Mail will close and install the downloaded update.
messages.settings.confirmation.removeTranslationS: This removes the translation service address and API key saved on this device. A service supplied through startup environment configuration remains available.
messages.settings.confirmation.removeTranslationA: This removes the API key encrypted on this device. An API key currently typed but not saved will not be saved; service address and timeout drafts remain.
messages.settings.confirmation.discardTranslation: Unsaved changes to the service address, API key, and timeout will be lost.
messages.settings.error.desktopNotificationsUnava: Desktop notifications are unavailable right now.
messages.settings.error.browserNotificationsUnsup: This browser does not support desktop notifications.
messages.settings.error.systemNotificationsUnavai: System notifications are unavailable right now.
messages.settings.error.notificationsPermission: Notification permission was not granted. Allow notifications in your system or browser settings.
messages.settings.error.autoUpdateUnavailable: Automatic updates are available only in the desktop app.
messages.settings.error.updateNotReady: The update is not ready yet. Try again shortly.
messages.update.error.integrity: The update file could not pass integrity or signature verification. Check network security software and try again.
messages.update.error.invalidResponse: The update service returned an invalid response. Restart Nami Mail and try again.
messages.update.error.tls: A secure update connection could not be established. Check your network, system time, and certificate settings.
messages.update.error.network: Could not reach the update service. Check your network connection and try again.
messages.update.error.rateLimited: The update service is temporarily limiting requests. Try again later.
messages.update.error.notFound: No update resource was found for this version. Try again later.
messages.update.status.disabled: Automatic updates are disabled for this installation.
messages.update.status.unpackaged: Development builds do not check for automatic updates.
messages.update.status.platformUnsupported: This update method is not supported on the current system.
messages.update.status.sourceUnconfigured: This version does not have an update source configured. You can continue using Nami Mail.
messages.update.status.trustUnavailable: Nami Mail could not verify the update source trust information, so checking stopped.
messages.update.status.scheduled: Updates have not been checked yet.
messages.update.status.downloadReady: v{version} is ready to install after restart.
messages.update.status.network: Could not reach the update service. Check your network, proxy, or firewall and try again.
messages.update.status.tls: A secure update connection could not be established. Check your network, system time, certificate settings, or security software.
messages.update.status.releaseUnavailable: No update resource is available for this version. Try again later.
messages.update.status.rateLimited: The update service is temporarily limiting requests. Try again later.
messages.update.status.signatureInvalid: The downloaded installer signature could not be verified, so the update was stopped. Check security software and download it again.
messages.update.status.integrityInvalid: The downloaded update did not pass integrity verification, so the update was stopped. Download the update again.
messages.update.status.archiveIntegrityInvalid: The cached update package did not pass integrity verification. Download the update again.
messages.update.status.mailDataBusy: To protect your mail data, Nami Mail has not safely closed local storage yet. Wait for mail activity to finish, then try again.
messages.update.status.installerNotStarted: The update installer could not start. Nami Mail can continue running; check system permissions or security software, then try again.
messages.update.status.installResult: The previous update did not finish while {stage}. Nami Mail can continue running; check for updates again.
messages.update.status.unknown: The update did not finish. Nami Mail can continue running; check again later.
messages.update.status.cleanupComplete: The update is installed and temporary update files were cleaned up.
messages.update.status.cleanupPending: The update is installed, but temporary update files still need cleanup. Close other Nami Mail processes, then check for updates again.
messages.update.installStage.wait: waiting for the app to close
messages.update.prompt.unavailable: Automatic updates are available only in the desktop app.
messages.update.prompt.available.title: {version} is available
messages.update.prompt.available.description: The download runs in the background and will not interrupt your work.
messages.update.prompt.downloading.title: Preparing {version}
messages.update.prompt.downloading.description: When the download is ready, choose a convenient time to restart and install it.
messages.update.prompt.ready.title: {version} is ready to install
messages.update.prompt.ready.description: Restart Nami Mail to finish updating.
messages.update.prompt.checking.title: Looking for a new version
messages.update.prompt.upToDate.title: {version} is installed
messages.update.prompt.error.title: The update could not be completed
messages.update.prompt.error.description: The update check for {version} could not be completed. You can check again later.
messages.update.prompt.complete.title: {version} is installed
messages.update.prompt.complete.description: The update is installed and temporary update files are being cleaned up or have already been removed.
messages.update.prompt.background.description: The download continues in the background while you use Nami Mail.
messages.update.prompt.cleanupComplete: The update is installed and temporary update files were cleaned up.
messages.update.prompt.cleanupRemaining: The update is installed, but temporary update files still need to be cleaned up.
messages.update.prompt.error.notReady: The update is not ready yet. Try again shortly.
messages.update.prompt.snooze.label: Remind me later
messages.error.oauthNotConfigured.title: Secure sign-in is not configured
messages.error.oauthNotConfigured.message: This device does not have the OAuth sign-in details required for this account.
messages.error.oauthNotConfigured.guidance: Ask an administrator to configure secure sign-in, or use an app password supported by the provider.
messages.error.oauthCallbackUnavailable.title: Could not receive authorization result
messages.error.oauthCallbackUnavailable.message: Browser sign-in opened, but this device did not receive the authorization callback.
messages.error.oauthCallbackUnavailable.guidance: Complete browser sign-in and try again. Confirm that security software is not blocking Nami Mail.
messages.error.oauthExpired.title: Authorization expired
messages.error.oauthExpired.message: The account's secure sign-in credentials are no longer valid.
messages.error.oauthExpired.guidance: Sign in to this account again to continue syncing.
messages.error.oauthInvalidState.title: Invalid authorization request
messages.error.oauthInvalidState.message: The returned authorization request could not be matched to this sign-in session.
messages.error.oauthInvalidState.guidance: Close old authorization pages in the browser, then start secure sign-in again.
messages.error.oauthIdentityInvalid.title: Authorized account does not match
messages.error.oauthIdentityInvalid.message: The account used to sign in does not match the email address being added.
messages.error.oauthIdentityInvalid.guidance: Sign in again using the account that matches the email address.
messages.error.oauthConnectionFailed.title: Could not reach authorization service
messages.error.oauthConnectionFailed.message: A connection to the provider's secure sign-in service could not be established.
messages.error.oauthConnectionFailed.guidance: Check your network, proxy, and system time, then try again.
messages.error.oauthCancelled.title: Authorization cancelled
messages.error.oauthCancelled.message: Secure sign-in was not completed in the browser.
messages.error.oauthCancelled.guidance: Start secure sign-in again when you are ready to continue.
messages.error.oauthFailed.title: Secure sign-in failed
messages.error.oauthFailed.message: The provider did not complete this authorization.
messages.error.oauthFailed.guidance: Try again. If it still fails, check account security settings or use an app password.
messages.error.oauthRequired.title: Secure sign-in is required
messages.error.oauthRequired.message: This email provider does not accept normal password sign-in.
messages.error.oauthRequired.guidance: Use the secure sign-in method provided by the email provider.
messages.error.reauthRequired.title: Sign-in is required again
messages.error.reauthRequired.message: This account's authorization expired or was revoked.
messages.error.reauthRequired.guidance: Sign in again from account settings.
messages.error.partialSync.title: Some mail has not synced
messages.error.partialSync.message: The account is connected, but some folders or messages did not finish syncing.
messages.error.partialSync.guidance: Try syncing again later. If it continues, check your network and account permissions.
messages.error.localDataInvalid.title: Local mail data could not be read
messages.error.localDataInvalid.message: To protect your data, Nami Mail did not continue with invalid local mail data.
messages.error.localDataInvalid.guidance: Add the account again or contact support, and keep the data files on this device.
messages.error.providerConfiguration.title: Server settings do not match
messages.error.providerConfiguration.message: The provider rejected the current protocol or server settings.
messages.error.providerConfiguration.guidance: Check IMAP, SMTP, ports, and encryption. Use manual setup if needed.
messages.error.tlsCertificateFailed.title: Server certificate could not be verified
messages.error.tlsCertificateFailed.message: Certificate verification failed for the secure connection.
messages.error.tlsCertificateFailed.guidance: Check the system time, network interception software, and server address. Do not ignore certificate errors.
messages.error.tlsHandshakeFailed.title: Secure connection negotiation failed
messages.error.tlsHandshakeFailed.message: TLS / STARTTLS encryption could not be negotiated with the mail server.
messages.error.tlsHandshakeFailed.guidance: Confirm the server port and encryption method, then check network interception or proxy settings.
messages.error.tlsFailed.title: Could not establish a secure connection
messages.error.tlsFailed.message: An encrypted connection to the mail server could not be established.
messages.error.tlsFailed.guidance: Check the server address, port, encryption method, and network security software.
messages.error.serverNotFound.title: Mail server could not be found
messages.error.serverNotFound.message: The configured server address could not be resolved or reached.
messages.error.serverNotFound.guidance: Check the email address, server domain, and network DNS settings.
messages.error.networkUnavailable.title: Network unavailable
messages.error.networkUnavailable.message: The current network cannot reach the mail service.
messages.error.networkUnavailable.guidance: Check your network connection, airplane mode, VPN, or proxy, then try again.
messages.error.connectionRefused.title: Server refused the connection
messages.error.connectionRefused.message: The server was reached, but refused this connection.
messages.error.connectionRefused.guidance: Check the server address, port, encryption method, and whether the provider allows IMAP / SMTP.
messages.error.timeout.title: Connection timed out
messages.error.timeout.message: The mail server did not respond in time.
messages.error.timeout.guidance: Check network quality, VPN, or proxy settings, then try again later.
messages.error.imapDisabled.title: IMAP is not enabled
messages.error.imapDisabled.message: This account has not enabled third-party mail client access.
messages.error.imapDisabled.guidance: Enable IMAP in webmail settings and create the client credentials required by the provider.
messages.error.smtpAuthFailed.title: Outgoing server authentication failed
messages.error.smtpAuthFailed.message: The SMTP server rejected the current sign-in credentials.
messages.error.smtpAuthFailed.guidance: Check outgoing server settings and use an app password or client authorization code.
messages.error.imapAuthFailed.title: Incoming server authentication failed
messages.error.imapAuthFailed.message: The IMAP server rejected the current sign-in credentials.
messages.error.imapAuthFailed.guidance: Check the email address, password or authorization code, and confirm that IMAP is enabled.
messages.error.invalidCredential.title: Invalid sign-in credential
messages.error.invalidCredential.message: The server rejected the entered password or authorization code.
messages.error.invalidCredential.guidance: Use an app password or client authorization code created by the provider, not a one-time code.
messages.error.accountExists.title: This email account was already added
messages.error.accountExists.message: The same email account already exists on this device.
messages.error.accountExists.guidance: Return to the mail list or manage the existing account in account settings.
messages.error.connectionFailed.title: Could not connect to mail server
messages.error.connectionFailed.message: The connection to the mail server ended before it could finish.
messages.error.connectionFailed.guidance: Check your network, server address, and port, then try again.
messages.error.localServiceUnavailable.title: Local mail service is not running
messages.error.localServiceUnavailable.message: Nami Mail could not reach its local mail service.
messages.error.localServiceUnavailable.guidance: Restart Nami Mail. If the issue continues, check whether security software is blocking it.
messages.error.localServiceError.title: Local mail service encountered an error
messages.error.localServiceError.message: The local mail service could not complete this request.
messages.error.localServiceError.guidance: Try again later. If the issue continues, restart Nami Mail.
messages.error.unknown.title: Operation not completed
messages.error.unknown.message: The specific cause could not be determined.
messages.error.unknown.guidance: Check your network and account settings, then try again.
messages.error.accountError.title: Account needs to reconnect
messages.error.accountError.message: This account cannot be accessed normally right now.
messages.error.accountError.guidance: Try syncing again or check connection details in account settings.
messages.error.accountDegraded.title: Account sync is incomplete
messages.error.accountDegraded.message: Some folders or messages for this account have not synced.
messages.error.accountDegraded.guidance: Try syncing again later and check network and provider status.
messages.provider.server.title: {provider} server settings
messages.provider.generic.credentialHint: Use the {credential} provided by your email service. Do not enter a one-time code.
messages.provider.generic.helpText: Follow {provider}'s official help to complete account security setup.
messages.provider.generic.caveat: If this preset is not suitable, use the settings provided by your email provider or administrator.
messages.provider.setup.oauth.authorize: Complete browser sign-in and allow Nami Mail to access your mail.
messages.provider.setup.oauth.admin: For a work or school account, contact the administrator if access still fails.
messages.provider.setup.clientCode.enable: Enable IMAP / SMTP and complete any required security verification.
messages.provider.setup.clientCode.paste: Create a client authorization code and paste it here.
messages.provider.setup.appPassword.signIn: Sign in to {provider} account security settings.
messages.provider.setup.appPassword.create: Create an app password for this mail client only.
messages.provider.setup.appPassword.paste: Copy the app password and paste it here.
messages.provider.setup.password.enable: Confirm that third-party mail client access is allowed.
messages.provider.setup.password.paste: Enter the password that your provider allows for mail clients.
messages.native.tray.failure.title: Unable to minimize to tray
messages.native.tray.failure.message: Nami Mail could not create a system tray icon. The window will stay open. Restart Nami Mail and try again.
messages.native.closePrompt.title: When closing the window
messages.native.closePrompt.message: Should Nami Mail keep receiving new mail in the background after the window closes?
messages.native.closePrompt.detail: When minimized to the tray, Nami Mail continues syncing mail and can show notifications. You can change this later in Settings > Desktop.
messages.native.closePreference.failure.title: Unable to save close preference
messages.native.closePreference.failure.message: This choice will still be used now, but Nami Mail will ask again the next time you close the window.
messages.native.notification.multipleBody: Messages from {sender} and others have synced to Inbox
messages.native.startup.failure.title: Nami Mail could not start
messages.native.startup.failure.message: The local mail service could not start.
